title: Relics Of The Fallen Bosses
description: Relics Of The Fallen Bosses Adds custom Legendary Items that have a chance to drop when you kill a boss Items include: The wither Hammer Warden Chestplate and Ender Dragon Bow
body:
# Relics Of The Fallen Bosses
![This mod Adds legendary items that drop when you kill bosses](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b39f3fa986a3d3b93c59368605a15c15515bedac.png)

Legendary Items Include:

Wither Hammer: The wither hammer has 11 attack damage that is higher than the netherite axe and on right click shoots a wither head out of the hammer,

Warden Chestplate: This chestplate turns you into the warden giving you the blindness of a warden but the strength of a warden too letting you 2 shot an iron golem with your fist,

Saving the best for last the Ender Dragon Bow: This bow shoots out an arrow that does 6 hearts of damage and it also shoots Dragons Breath to deliver aoe damage to areas affected.

I hope you have fun playing Relics Of The Fallen Bosses My First Mod as a mod creator My youtube is: @Hatchson if you want to show any love or tag me if you make a video on the mod
